notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly flies out to left fielder Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki. Troy Johnston scores. Brett Sullivan to 2nd.
